title: High-Protein Cookies & Cream Waffles
description: Macro-friendly waffles using Leanfit C&C whey — high protein, moderate carb, kid-approved flavour.
ingredients: 2 scoops (66g) Leanfit Cookies & Cream whey protein
1/2 cup (60g) oat flour (blend rolled oats if needed)
instructions: Whisk together 2 scoops (66g) whey protein, 1/2 cup oat flour, 1 tsp baking powder, and 1/4 tsp salt in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk 2 eggs, 1/2 cup milk, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, 1 tsp vanilla, and 1 tsp maple syrup until smooth.
Pour wet ingredients into dry and mix until just combined — don't overwork it. Batter will be thick.
Preheat waffle iron and spray with canola cooking spray.
Pour half the batter (roughly 1/2 cup) onto the iron, close, and cook 3–4 minutes until steam subsides and waffles release cleanly.
Repeat with remaining batter. Serve immediately or cool on a rack to freeze.
notes: Per serving (1 large waffle). Freeze extras and reheat in the toaster — texture holds well. Greek yogurt keeps these moist without adding fat. If batter is too thick, add 1–2 tbsp milk. Carb note: oat flour is whole grain so glycemic load is lower than the number suggests.
